sessions.intent: Build IReader — the format-agnostic pull surface mirroring IWriter — so the type reads its own value off a single decode pass; one ITypeReader registry, front-end (JsonReader/CsvReader/BinaryReader) picked by kind; delete the object-raw read path.

before.assumptions: allows ref struct available (net10/C#14); Part B container raw-slot backing already landed; Wire.ReadBody triple-parses the value slot today.
before.risk: Deep-shared read path — regressions ripple across Wire/Data/list/dict/source. Verbatim passthrough + @schema:data nested-Data + signature layer must survive. ref-struct RawValue subtree capture is the one novel mechanic.

actions.context: IReader pull surface + TokenKind; ref struct json.Reader holding Utf8JsonReader BY VALUE (ref field to a ref struct is CS9050-illegal), threaded by ref, STJ-bridge copy-in/out via Inner. allows ref struct confirmed available on net10/C#14.
ITypeReader.Read<TReader> with allows ref struct anti-constraint. Added Typed(type,kind) registry + ITypeReader discovery alongside the existing object-raw Read scan; both coexist during migration.
Three typed readers mirroring their Default.Read semantics. Chosen as the B1 proof because they have no kind ambiguity / no %ref% carve-out.
ReadBody value case: typed-reader fast path (no JsonElement DOM, no Build) gated to where Build runs today; new born local short-circuits at EndObject. Eager/deferred paths otherwise untouched.
bool/guid/duration wire round-trips. Mutation-proven the typed path is live (bool throw → round-trip fails with probe; reverted → green).

after.status: B1 landed and verified — IReader mechanism proven end-to-end on bool/guid/duration. B2+ (number/text/containers/polymorphic, source.Value rewire, registry deletion) pending.
after.health: green — dev.sh full all 6 projects green, counts identical to baseline except Wire 495→498. Pre-existing plang --test abort unrelated/unchanged.
after.notes: Approach B per Ingi. RawValue is a re-encode fallback until approach A (buffer-owning) lands. Two reader registries coexist intentionally during migration.
